Configuration for FTDI interface with specific device description, VID/PID, and signal layout.

# Purpose
The configuration file defines settings for an FTDI interface. It specifies the device description as "Dual RS232-HS" and sets the vendor ID and product ID to `0x0403` and `0x6010`, respectively. The file configures the initial layout with output and direction values, and it defines signals for `nTRST`, `nSRST`, and an LED, indicating their data and output enable values. The LED configuration uses inverted output logic, where a low signal turns the LED on.
